name: Manila Nesting Tables - Threshold™: Gold-Tone Metal, Hand-Carved, No Assembly Required
description:
Add a decorative touch to your space by accenting with Manila Nesting Tables from Threshold™. This pack of two nesting tables is designed in a cylindrical shape with hand carving, making the pieces a perfect combination of traditional and artistic style. Made with metal, these gold-tone nesting tables easily integrate into a variety of decor settings.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.

Dimension Details:
Overall Height of Large Table: 20 inches
Overall Diameter of Large Table: 16 inches
Overall Height of Small Table : 18 inches
Overall Diameter of Small Table : 14 inches
